# OneCare

> OneCare is a connected health platform that eliminates information asymmetry between patients and their care teams — track vitals, manage medications, store health records, and share continuous updates with clinicians from hospital to home.

OneCare gives patients (and their families) a single home for their health data — vitals, medications, lab results, documents, schedules — and gives clinicians a live, longitudinal view of their patients between visits. The platform is HIPAA-aligned, mobile-first, works offline, and installs as a PWA. Clinicians get an inbox-style "Today" triage, encounters/SOAP notes, clinical templates, referrals, alerts, and role-based access for private practices and larger groups. Planned integrations include FHIR and QHIN (Particle Health) for network-wide record retrieval.

## Product

- [Features](/features): Full feature list across patient and clinician sides
- [Pricing](/pricing): Plans for patients and clinicians (audience toggle)
- [For Clinicians](/for-clinicians): Why practices choose OneCare
- [Install](/install): Install OneCare as a PWA on iOS, Android, or desktop

## Company

- [About](/about): Mission — eliminate post-discharge information asymmetry
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the OneCare team
- [Careers](/careers): Open roles — remote-first, patient-first culture
- [Help Center](/help): FAQs and product guides
- [Knowledge Base](/knowledge): Health-literacy articles and guides

## Open roles

- [Sales Development Representative](/careers/sdr): Remote, part-time / contract — clinic outreach and demo scheduling
- [Healthcare Content Specialist](/careers/content): Remote, paid — patient education content and clinical thought leadership
- [Community Growth Lead (Nigeria)](/careers/community-growth-lead): Lagos / Abuja, paid — on-the-ground adoption, pharmacy partnerships
- [Clinical Advisory Board](/careers/clinical-advisor): Remote, unpaid advisory — physicians and nurses shaping remote patient monitoring
- [Product Feedback Panel](/careers/product-panel): Remote, unpaid — clinicians shaping product direction

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How OneCare handles personal and health data

- [Medical Disclaimer](/disclaimer): OneCare is not a substitute for professional medical advice
